arts.ttl: Club ‘admire’ Liverpool player, but deny making offer – Boost for Reds as they rule out signing him
arts.sum: Liverpool star Virgil van Dijk’s contract expires at the end of this season and the Premier League side haven’t yet tied him down to a new deal. Towards the end of last month, the centre-back told Viaplay that there’s been no update from the Reds regarding his renewal. arts.ttl: Revealed: Liverpool showing interest in winger transfer but he has one club in mind
arts.sum: Liverpool have shown an interest in Bayern Munich winger Leroy Sane in recent weeks, though his preference is for a transfer to Barcelona, sources have told CaughtOffside. Sane is nearing the end of his contract at Bayern Munich, and it seems he’s perhaps edging towards leaving the Allianz Arena instead of renewing his deal there.
